channel.title: Python on Bo's lightweight blog - Tips | Tutorial | Random thought
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Bo's lightweight blog - Tips | Tutorial | Random thought

item.title: How to correctly apply Batch Normalization layer in TensorFlow（the pitfall of UPDATE_OPS)
item.description: Batch Normalization layer in TensorFlow In this post, I’m not going to explain the math behind what batch normalization does and why it could help if we apply batch-normalization in our deep networks. For a quick look of what batch normalization is, check this post. For a deeper understanding of batch normalization, you can look up in the paper “Batch Normalization: Accelerating Deep Network Training by Reducing Internal Covariate Shift” by Ioeffe and Szegedy (2015).
